boot-source.boot_args: console=ttyS0 reboot=k panic=1 pci=off debug systemd.show_status=true systemd.log_level=debug panic=1 nr_cpus=1 selinux=0 systemd.unit=kata-containers.target systemd.mask=systemd-networkd.service systemd.mask=systemd-networkd.socket scsi_mod.scan=none agent.debug_console agent.debug_console_vport=1026 systemd.unified_cgroup_hierarchy=1
